text:
World silver medallist Jacob Krop has come a long way; from a humble background in a remote Chepkunyuk village in West Pokot to making it to the 2024 Olympic Games.To the 5,000m star, making history in the Games that kicks off this Friday is his main focus.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: Jacob Krop: From Pokot South to Olympics arena
author: Stephen Rutto
description: The 23-year-old athlete promises to represent the country well at the Paris Olympics.
